description: Leave removes a group from BOTH surfaces (hermetic, single-instance): a stronger l3_leave_group. Create a group, prove it is present in BOTH knownGroups (FFI layer) AND conversationIds (UIKit sidebar), then leave and prove it is gone from BOTH. Catches a leave that clears the FFI set but orphans the sidebar conversation (or vice-versa). EXACT containsItem/notContainsItem throughout. The leave is the gated step; teardown re-leaves (idempotent) so a failure before the leave still leaks nothing.
